exampleContent.sectionSubtitle: Real prompts and articles from this template

prompts.title: Example Action Prompts
prompts.subtitle: Practical tasks to move your habit tracking forward
items: Complete a comprehensive habit audit by tracking all your current daily activities for one full week
Identify and define 3 specific habits you want to build, making each one measurable and time-bound
Research and read one evidence-based book or guide on habit formation science and psychology
Set up a habit tracking system using your preferred method (app, journal, or spreadsheet) with daily check-in reminders
Create a detailed environment audit of your living and working spaces to identify habit triggers and obstacles
Schedule and complete a personal values assessment to align your habit goals with your core priorities
